ns0:entry.ns0:title: AIEraDev/Clypra
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AIEraDev/Clypra
Language: typescript
A modern video editor built with Tauri, React, and TypeScript. Focus on building free capabilities of premium capcut functionalities

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Augani/openreel-video
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Augani/openreel-video
Language: typescript
OpenReel Video - Professional browser-based video editor. Open source CapCut alternative. 100% browser-based, no installation, no cloud uploads, no watermarks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mksglu/context-mode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mksglu/context-mode
Language: typescript
Context window optimization for AI coding agents. Sandboxes tool output (98% reduction), persists session memory, and enforces routing across 17 platforms via MCP + hooks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moeru-ai/airi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi
Language: typescript
💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.
